name: Iso11783OPControlAudio
title: Iso11783OPControlAudio
syntax: long Iso11783OPControlAudio( dword ecuHandle, dword activations, dword frequency, dword onTime, dword offTime );
description: The function plays an acoustic signal on the Virtual Terminal. A Control Audio Device command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
